storyboard.content: I have pins and needles in my hands and feet, especially in the morning, and it does not go away quickly the way it does when your foot falls asleep.
My grip strength has gotten weaker — I dropped a coffee mug last week because I just could not hold onto it.
Sometimes the numbness travels up my arms.
The symptoms have been slowly getting worse over the past three months.
It affects my daily activities, especially fine motor tasks, but I am still able to work. The biggest problem is with my grip and fine motor control.
The numbness and tingling are worse first thing in the morning.
